assertions.description: navigator.mediaDevices exposes getAllScreensMedia() for capturing every connected screen at once.
getDisplayMedia() remains exposed as the per-surface user-gesture-gated counterpart.
getAllScreensMedia() returns a Promise (it is an async operation that requires admin-policy install).
assertions.test: (()=>{if(!navigator.mediaDevices||!navigator.mediaDevices.getAllScreensMedia)return false;try{const p=navigator.mediaDevices.getAllScreensMedia();const ok=p && typeof p.then==='function';if(p && p.catch) p.catch(()=>{});return ok;}catch(e){return true;}})()

assertions.description: getAllScreensMedia() rejects on a normal web origin with no enterprise policy granting the capability.
MediaStream constructor exists; getAllScreensMedia resolves to a sequence of MediaStreams.
